parameters.query:
-- Lookup manufacturer
SELECT entity_type, glpi_id, name 
FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = 'manufacturer' 
  AND normalized_name = $1

UNION ALL

-- Lookup model - use partial matching since cache has generic brands
SELECT entity_type, glpi_id, name 
FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = 'model' 
  AND ($2 LIKE '%' || normalized_name || '%' OR normalized_name LIKE '%' || $2 || '%')

UNION ALL

-- Lookup processor - extract just the processor model number
SELECT entity_type, glpi_id, name 
FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = 'processor' 
  AND normalized_name LIKE '%' || 
      CASE 
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%i5-1135g7%' THEN '1135'
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%i7-1185g7%' THEN '1185' 
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%i5-8265u%' THEN '8265'
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%i5-7200u%' THEN '7200'
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%i5-6200u%' THEN '6200'
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%i5-8250u%' THEN '8250'
        WHEN $3 LIKE '%ryzen 3 2200u%' THEN '2200'
        ELSE regexp_replace($3, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      END || '%'

UNION ALL

-- Lookup memory - round to nearest whole number and match
SELECT entity_type, glpi_id, name 
FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = 'memory' 
  AND normalized_name LIKE '%' || 
      CASE 
        WHEN $4 LIKE '%7.5%' OR $4 LIKE '%15.3%' THEN '8'
        WHEN $4 LIKE '%3.5%' OR $4 LIKE '%3.6%' OR $4 LIKE '%3.7%' THEN '4'
        WHEN $4 LIKE '%1.7%' THEN '2'
        WHEN $4 LIKE '%6.6%' THEN '8'
        WHEN $4 LIKE '%31.2%' THEN '32'
        ELSE regexp_replace($4, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      END || '%'

UNION ALL

-- Lookup computer type
SELECT entity_type, glpi_id, name 
FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = 'computer_type' 
  AND normalized_name LIKE '%' || replace($5, 'type: ', '') || '%'

UNION ALL

-- Lookup storage
SELECT entity_type, glpi_id, name 
FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = 'storage' 
  AND normalized_name LIKE '%' || regexp_replace($6, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') || '%';

-- Delete any existing entry with same entity_type and normalized_name
DELETE FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = $1 AND normalized_name = $4;

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO glpi_cache (entity_type, glpi_id, name, normalized_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
RETURNING *;

-- Delete any existing entry with same entity_type and normalized_name
DELETE FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = $1 AND normalized_name = $4;

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO glpi_cache (entity_type, glpi_id, name, normalized_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
RETURNING *;

-- Delete any existing entry with same entity_type and normalized_name
DELETE FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = $1 AND normalized_name = $4;

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO glpi_cache (entity_type, glpi_id, name, normalized_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
RETURNING *;

-- Delete any existing entry with same entity_type and normalized_name

WHERE entity_type = $1 AND normalized_name = $4;

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO glpi_cache (entity_type, glpi_id, name, normalized_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
RETURNING *;

-- Delete any existing entry with same entity_type and normalized_name
DELETE FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = $1 AND normalized_name = $4;

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO glpi_cache (entity_type, glpi_id, name, normalized_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
RETURNING *;

-- Delete any existing entry with same entity_type and normalized_name
DELETE FROM glpi_cache 
WHERE entity_type = $1 AND normalized_name = $4;

-- Insert new entry
INSERT INTO glpi_cache (entity_type, glpi_id, name, normalized_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
RETURNING *;
